description: A virtual coaching platform connecting fitness enthusiasts with certified trainers through video-based form analysis. Users submit workout videos and receive personalized feedback on technique, form corrections, and injury prevention guidance from experienced professionals.

userStories.story: As a fitness enthusiast, I can create an account and profile so that I can access personalized coaching services
acceptanceCriteria: User can register with email/password or social OAuth (Google, Facebook)
User profile includes fitness level, goals, and areas of focus
Email verification is required before full access
Profile can be edited at any time

userStories.story: As a user, I can upload workout videos so that trainers can review my form and technique
acceptanceCriteria: Support video formats: MP4, MOV, AVI up to 500MB per file
User can add title, description, and workout type tags
Video upload shows progress indicator
User can specify which aspects they want feedback on (form, technique, safety)
Videos are stored securely and privately

userStories.story: As a user, I can request feedback from certified trainers so that I receive expert guidance
acceptanceCriteria: User can browse available trainers with profiles, specialties, and ratings
User can select specific trainer or get matched automatically
Request includes workout type, urgency level, and specific concerns
User receives notification when feedback is ready
Estimated turnaround time is displayed (24-48 hours standard)

userStories.story: As a certified trainer, I can review submitted videos and provide feedback so that I can help users improve
acceptanceCriteria: Trainer dashboard shows pending review requests
Video player with playback controls, slow-motion, and frame-by-frame options
Trainer can add timestamped comments on specific moments
Trainer can upload annotated screenshots or demonstration videos
Feedback includes written analysis, corrections, and exercise recommendations

userStories.story: As a user, I can view trainer feedback on my videos so that I can improve my technique
acceptanceCriteria: Feedback displays alongside original video with synchronized timestamps
User can see annotated screenshots and trainer notes
User can ask follow-up questions in comment thread
Feedback history is accessible in user profile
User can rate and review the feedback received

userStories.story: As a user, I can purchase coaching credits or subscriptions so that I can access feedback services
acceptanceCriteria: Pay-per-review option (single credit purchase)
Monthly subscription tiers (5, 10, unlimited reviews)
Secure payment processing via Stripe
Credits are clearly displayed in user dashboard
Subscription auto-renewal with cancellation option

userStories.story: As a trainer, I can manage my availability and earnings so that I can control my workload
acceptanceCriteria: Trainer can set active/inactive status
Trainer can specify workout specialties (weightlifting, yoga, cardio, etc.)
Dashboard shows earnings, completed reviews, and ratings
Trainer receives notifications for new review requests
Payout system integrated (monthly payments)

userStories.story: As an admin, I can verify trainer certifications so that platform quality is maintained
acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard for reviewing trainer applications
Upload and verification of certification documents
Approval/rejection workflow with notifications
Ability to suspend or remove trainers
View platform analytics and user metrics

functionalRequirements.authentication: Multi-role authentication system supporting users, trainers, and admins. Email/password with email verification. OAuth integration (Google, Facebook). Role-based access control (RBAC). Password reset and account recovery.
functionalRequirements.coreFeatures: Video upload and storage with cloud hosting. Video playback with advanced controls (slow-mo, frame-by-frame). Timestamped commenting system. Trainer-user matching algorithm based on specialties. Notification system (email and in-app). Rating and review system for trainers. Search and filter for trainers by specialty, rating, and availability.
functionalRequirements.dataManagement: User profiles with fitness goals and history. Trainer profiles with certifications, specialties, and performance metrics. Video metadata and storage references. Feedback and review data with timestamps. Payment and transaction records. Secure file storage for certification documents. Database with relationships between users, trainers, videos, and feedback.
functionalRequirements.integrations: Stripe for payment processing and subscriptions. AWS S3 or Cloudinary for video storage and streaming. SendGrid or similar for transactional emails. Video processing service for thumbnails and optimization. Optional: Twilio for SMS notifications. Analytics platform (Google Analytics or Mixpanel)

nonFunctionalRequirements.performance: API response time < 300ms for 95th percentile. Video upload with resumable uploads for reliability. Video streaming with adaptive bitrate. Page load time < 2 seconds. Database queries optimized with indexes. Lazy loading for video thumbnails and lists.
nonFunctionalRequirements.scalability: Support 10,000 registered users at launch. Handle 100 concurrent video uploads. Support 500 concurrent users browsing platform. Horizontal scaling capability for backend services. CDN for video delivery to reduce server load. Database connection pooling and query optimization.
nonFunctionalRequirements.security: All videos private by default, accessible only to user and assigned trainer. Encryption at rest for video files and sensitive data. HTTPS/TLS for all connections. Secure payment processing (PCI DSS compliance via Stripe). Input validation and sanitization to prevent XSS and SQL injection. CSRF protection on all forms. Rate limiting on uploads and API endpoints. Regular security audits and dependency updates.
nonFunctionalRequirements.availability: 99.5% uptime SLA. Automated backups daily with 30-day retention. Database replication for disaster recovery. Health checks and monitoring with alerting. Graceful error handling with user-friendly messages. Video upload retry mechanism for failed uploads.

techConstraints.deployment: Vercel for Next.js application hosting. Railway or Supabase for PostgreSQL database. AWS S3 or Cloudinary for video storage. Vercel Edge Functions for API routes. Environment-based configuration for dev/staging/production.
techConstraints.additionalTools: Prisma ORM for database management. NextAuth.js for authentication. Stripe SDK for payments. React Query for state management. Tailwind CSS for styling. Zod for validation. Uploadthing or similar for file uploads. FFmpeg for video processing (thumbnails, compression)

successMetrics: Users can complete video upload within 2 minutes for 200MB file
Trainers can provide feedback within 24-48 hours on average
User satisfaction rating > 4.0/5.0 for feedback quality
95% of videos successfully uploaded on first attempt
Platform processes 100+ video reviews per week at steady state
Conversion rate: 30% of registered users purchase at least one review
Trainer retention: 80% of trainers remain active after 3 months
Zero data breaches or security incidents
Page load time < 2 seconds on 4G connection

phase1: User and trainer registration with email authentication
Basic profile creation for both roles

dataModel.users: id, email, password_hash, name, role (user/trainer/admin), fitness_level, goals, created_at, updated_at
dataModel.trainers: id, user_id, bio, specialties[], certifications[], rating, total_reviews, is_verified, is_active, hourly_rate
dataModel.videos: id, user_id, title, description, file_url, thumbnail_url, workout_type, duration, file_size, status (uploaded/processing/ready), created_at
dataModel.feedback: id, video_id, trainer_id, content, rating, created_at, updated_at
dataModel.comments: id, feedback_id, user_id, content, timestamp (video position), created_at
dataModel.transactions: id, user_id, amount, type (credit/subscription), status, stripe_payment_id, created_at

uiuxRequirements.design: Clean, modern, and professional aesthetic. Mobile-responsive design (mobile-first approach). Accessible (WCAG 2.1 AA compliance). Consistent color scheme aligned with fitness/wellness theme. Clear call-to-action buttons. Intuitive navigation with clear user flows.
keyPages: Landing page with value proposition and how-it-works
User dashboard (video library, credits, feedback history)
uiuxRequirements.userFlow: New user signs up -> Completes profile -> Uploads first video -> Selects trainer or auto-match -> Makes payment -> Receives notification when feedback ready -> Views feedback -> Optionally asks follow-up questions -> Rates feedback
